memoryArtifacts.description: Proof of the existence of Sir James de Peckham. Proves the Existence of Sir John de Peckham who was born in Hadlow Manor around 1290. Taken from Peckham genealogy Volume I.
Effigy of Sir Thomas Cawne located in Inghtam Mote in Kent. Sir Thomas was the first to own the Mote. My ancestor Sir James de Peckham was the second to own the Mote.

zh.lifeSummary: 當James Peckham於1340年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦時，他的父親John Peckham20歲，母親Ellen Bokeland21歲。他於大約1370年與Margaret Steplegate結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1389年在英國英格蘭肯特被列為high sheriff of kent。他去世於1400年在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國肯特萊坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Peckham于1340年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊坦时，他的父亲John Peckham20岁，母亲Ellen Bokeland21岁。他于大约1370年与Margaret Steplegate结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1389年在英国英格兰肯特被列为high sheriff of kent。他去世于1400年在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国肯特萊坦。

nameMeanings.name: Peckham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from East and West Peckham (Kent), Peckham in Camberwell (Surrey), or Peckham Farm in Framfield (Sussex). All three placenames probably derive from Old English pēac ‘peak’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When James Peckham was born in 1340, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Peckham, was 20 and his mother, Ellen Bokeland, was 21. He married Margaret Steplegate about 1370. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1389, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of kent in Kent, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Wrotham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Peckham est né en 1340, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Peckham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ellen Bokeland, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Steplegate environ 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1389, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of kent à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Peckham 1340 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Peckham 20 und seine Mutter Ellen Bokeland 21. Er hat um 1370 Margaret Steplegate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1389, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of kent in Kent, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wrotham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Peckham è nato il nel 1340 nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Peckham, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Bokeland, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Steplegate circa 1370. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1389, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of kent nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1400, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Wrotham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: James Peckhamが1340年にイギリスイギリスケントウロサムで生まれた時，父John Peckhamは20歳，母Ellen Bokelandは21歳であった。約1370年にMargaret Steplegateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1389年，49歳の時，イギリスイギリスケントでの職業はhigh sheriff of kentと記録されている。彼は1400年に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスケントウロサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Peckham(이)가 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Peckham(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Bokeland(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 Margaret Steplegate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1389년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 high sheriff of kent이었다. 그는 1400년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 로섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Peckham nasceu em 1340, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Peckham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Bokeland, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Steplegate aproximadamente 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1389, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of kent em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1400, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Peckham родился в 1340 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Peckham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Bokeland, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Steplegate около 1370 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1389 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of kent в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Peckham nació en 1340, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Peckham, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Ellen Bokeland, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Steplegate aproximadamente 1370. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1389, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of kent en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1400, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra.
